content.content: One half of The Corner Of Zalexa, a vlog and challenge based YouTube channel that she runs with her sister. They have 70,000 subscribers and 17 million overall views. Their first YouTube video was uploaded on November 17, 2017, and was titled "Expectation vs Reality of Exercising". In October, 2018, the sisters spent 24 hours in the trunk of their father's car. The video they made reached over 1 million views in less than 5 months. Her sister is named Zaida. Their mother, Eva, frequently appears on the show. On December 7, 2017, she posted a group photo to Instagram withKarina Karina & Marina,¡Hoy no hay cole!,DivertiguayandJugando con Aby.
